programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: When you�re dealing with over-the-top personalities, you�re bound to have some controversial moments. Find out the tea when we re-live some of the most scandalous moments ever confessed from NeNe Leaks, LisaRaye McCoy, Charlamagne The God, Le�Andria Johnson, Lamar Odom and more.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Shirley Murdock is that rare singer-songwriter who is revered by fans of pop, R&B, dance music and gospel. But at the height of her career, an unthinkable tragedy tested her fortitude and her faith.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Chuckii Booker rose to fame in the late 80s as one of R&B's top crooners! But after just a few years, the pressures of stardom led Chuckii to abandon his solo career.

programme.title: Media
programme.desc: Jones Universal Media Productions (JUMP) has been dominating the national urban media scene for years. The Jones family is doing everything they can to put a stop to whoever is trying to tear them apart.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: During the Morning show Rickey announces it�s time for the annual fundraiser athis church. To make things different this year Bernice coaxes Rickey into being acelebrity judge on the first annual Gospel Idol. Knowing that Rickey is involved asponsor donates a top prize of $10,000 and a recording contract. Now everyonecomes out of the woodworks, claiming to have talent. The kids rehearse at thehouse hoping to get on. Even Maurice wants to dust off his old rap skills. JoeWillie and the Deuteronomaires perform, along with Kenny, Aunt Sylvia and ahost of other talented and not so talented people. What makes this show specialis it won�t be like your typical talent show. It will be shot like the early stages ofAmerican Idol where our celebrity judges (Rickey included) will decide who goesto the next round. Just like Randy, Paula and Simon, our judges will fightamongst each other and possibly with the talent they deny.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Brandon�s tries to become popular by befriending a highly recruited basketballplayer that attends his school. The player is accused by the school of cheating onhis college entrance exam and is suspended from school. The friend says he isinnocent and actually accuses the school of racism for questioning hisintelligence. The story takes on national headlines. Brandon says that he is surebeyond a shadow of a doubt about his new friend�s innocence and in an effort toimpress him, asks if Rickey will have his the player on his morning show to talkabout the injustice and possibly clear his friend�s name which Rickey does. Laterevidence comes out that the player really did cheat on the exam and was justusing Brandon to get on his dad�s show. A very disappointed Brandon tells Rickeywho talks to him about the importance of integrity.B STORYDe�anna accidentally breaks one of Rickey�s trophies and has to get it fixed beforeany one finds out. De�anna pieces it together with glue. Aaron says it still looksbad. Aunt Sylvia is cleaning around and accidentally bumps it. When shecatches it, it crumbles in her hand. Now Aunt Sylvia thinks she broke it. De�annacontinues to let her think it so that she can go to a party this weekend. She hasto convince Aaron to keep his mouth shut. At the end, De�anna confesses to AuntSylvia and when Rickey knocks the trophy over, Aunt Sylvia and De�anna decideto keep it to themselves.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: When Paula misses the final production meeting, Elise prods the group to take unfinished business into their own hands. Also, with shooting under way, Countess's elective surgery threatens to derail the Divas' indie project completely.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: On the final day of production, Countess's participation in the film is still in question. Also, Paula's sudden departure from set leaves Elise hanging. Finally, a bonfire chat takes a dark turn as blame is thrown and the Divas resolve old issues.

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Bombshell besties Chrisy and Charritta just might be too darn fly for the ATL dating pool. Can these voluptuous vixens help each other find a man who will get them out of the dating rat race?

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Joe, a serial dater, has yet to find that special someone. Noel just got out of a relationship and is back to being single. These two best buds of twenty years are both looking for �the one�. Will they truly know what the other needs to win at love?

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Grammy-nominated rapper Jeezy used his talent, along with his passion for business, to take his life and his music from the streets to mainstream; he began his career in 2001; 20 years later, his music has helped him pursue his true purpose in life.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Stevie J breaks down why there should be no discussion of 90s R&B and hip hop without mentioning his name. He's most known for his iconic appearances on reality television, but Stevie J produced a long list of musical hits during his run with Bad Boy Records.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Roxanne Shante used her fierce battle rap skills, honed during street battles with local MC’s for cash, to become rap’s first female star MC with the release of her 1984 hit, “Roxanne’s Revenge.” Then at only 25 years old, she walked away from it all.

programme.title: Jean of The Joneses
programme.desc: Chaos ensues after the estranged patriarch of the Jones family dies on their doorstep. When the paramedic who answers their 911 call tried to win over acerbic Jean Jones, his attempts are disrupted by old conflicts that come to a boil at the funeral.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Black women face challenges daily and still manage to make things happen. Black Girl Magic celebrates the beauty, power, accomplishments, and strength of some of our favorite UNCNSRD women

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: If you don’t have a seat at the table, sometimes you have to create your own. Black Hollywood has been making major contributions to TV and film for decades, whether recognized or not, and it’s not stopping any time soon

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Candi Staton is known as The Queen of Southern Soul, thanks to a string of hits, most notably the disco groove �Young Hearts Run Free.� But behind the success, Candi was fighting for her life.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: The Clark Sisters � these 2nd generation gospel stars broke down gospel/secular barriers for artists such as the Winans and Kirk Franklin, but their own personal demons, struggles within the family and backlash from the most traditional in the church community kept them from becoming the crossover gospel household names they were destined to become.

programme.title: Ringside
programme.desc: Ringside follows the road leading up to the biggest fight of the year between Spencer "Timber" Collier (Allen Maldonado) and Jaxon Holley (Tyler Lepley). Timber defends his title against Jaxon who is undefeated as he tries to navigate a difficult personal life that includes caring for his troubled sister and brother.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Rickey�s ex wife, Monica returns home after losing her big case in LA. She isdepressed about the case and spends more time with the kids in order to cheerherself up. She tells Rickey that she has missed the kids and wants to assumecustody. She is shocked when Rickey says no. De�anna overhears this andthinks Rickey is being unfair. Rickey thinks De�anna just wants to spend moretime with her mom because Monica doesn�t have as many rules as he does and isalways buying them things out of guilt. He reminds her that the kids are on agood schedule, doing well and have adjusted to life as it is. He also tells Monicashe can visit when ever and as often as she wants. That�s not good enough for hershe wants the kids to live with her. This causes a huge fight between the formercouple, resulting in Monica telling Rickey that she�s suing for full custody.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: After losing Kenny and having Maurice as his producer, who keeps messing up, Rickey realizes how much he needs Kenny. So Rickey goes to rescue Kenny from his contract at Ray's radio station.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: A night full of drama, shade and surprises as the five divas get together to hash out the season.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: Season 1 Reunion Special Part 2.

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Besties, Angelica & Christine have known each other since middle school, so helping the other find love should be an easy task! Will these ladies find their knights in shining armor or just experience another dating nightmare?

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Butter and Nia are a father/daughter duo who do everything together� including partying. Will these unconventional besties be able to solidify a love connection for each other?

programme.desc: Platinum selling R&B singer Keyshia Cole is known and loved for her transparency and authenticity. Through top selling albums and highly rated television shows, she has shared her life with the world. Now she's back with much more to say.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: When you�re dealing with over-the-top personalities, you�re bound to have some controversial moments. Find out the tea when we re-live some of the most scandalous moments ever confessed from NeNe Leaks, LisaRaye McCoy, Charlamagne The God, Le�Andria Johnson, Lamar Odom and more.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Shirley Murdock is that rare singer-songwriter who is revered by fans of pop, R&B, dance music and gospel. But at the height of her career, an unthinkable tragedy tested her fortitude and her faith.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Chuckii Booker rose to fame in the late 80s as one of R&B's top crooners! But after just a few years, the pressures of stardom led Chuckii to abandon his solo career.

programme.title: Media
programme.desc: Jones Universal Media Productions (JUMP) has been dominating the national urban media scene for years. The Jones family is doing everything they can to put a stop to whoever is trying to tear them apart.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: During the Morning show Rickey announces it�s time for the annual fundraiser athis church. To make things different this year Bernice coaxes Rickey into being acelebrity judge on the first annual Gospel Idol. Knowing that Rickey is involved asponsor donates a top prize of $10,000 and a recording contract. Now everyonecomes out of the woodworks, claiming to have talent. The kids rehearse at thehouse hoping to get on. Even Maurice wants to dust off his old rap skills. JoeWillie and the Deuteronomaires perform, along with Kenny, Aunt Sylvia and ahost of other talented and not so talented people. What makes this show specialis it won�t be like your typical talent show. It will be shot like the early stages ofAmerican Idol where our celebrity judges (Rickey included) will decide who goesto the next round. Just like Randy, Paula and Simon, our judges will fightamongst each other and possibly with the talent they deny.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Brandon�s tries to become popular by befriending a highly recruited basketballplayer that attends his school. The player is accused by the school of cheating onhis college entrance exam and is suspended from school. The friend says he isinnocent and actually accuses the school of racism for questioning hisintelligence. The story takes on national headlines. Brandon says that he is surebeyond a shadow of a doubt about his new friend�s innocence and in an effort toimpress him, asks if Rickey will have his the player on his morning show to talkabout the injustice and possibly clear his friend�s name which Rickey does. Laterevidence comes out that the player really did cheat on the exam and was justusing Brandon to get on his dad�s show. A very disappointed Brandon tells Rickeywho talks to him about the importance of integrity.B STORYDe�anna accidentally breaks one of Rickey�s trophies and has to get it fixed beforeany one finds out. De�anna pieces it together with glue. Aaron says it still looksbad. Aunt Sylvia is cleaning around and accidentally bumps it. When shecatches it, it crumbles in her hand. Now Aunt Sylvia thinks she broke it. De�annacontinues to let her think it so that she can go to a party this weekend. She hasto convince Aaron to keep his mouth shut. At the end, De�anna confesses to AuntSylvia and when Rickey knocks the trophy over, Aunt Sylvia and De�anna decideto keep it to themselves.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: When Paula misses the final production meeting, Elise prods the group to take unfinished business into their own hands. Also, with shooting under way, Countess's elective surgery threatens to derail the Divas' indie project completely.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: On the final day of production, Countess's participation in the film is still in question. Also, Paula's sudden departure from set leaves Elise hanging. Finally, a bonfire chat takes a dark turn as blame is thrown and the Divas resolve old issues.

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Bombshell besties Chrisy and Charritta just might be too darn fly for the ATL dating pool. Can these voluptuous vixens help each other find a man who will get them out of the dating rat race?

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Joe, a serial dater, has yet to find that special someone. Noel just got out of a relationship and is back to being single. These two best buds of twenty years are both looking for �the one�. Will they truly know what the other needs to win at love?

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Grammy-nominated rapper Jeezy used his talent, along with his passion for business, to take his life and his music from the streets to mainstream; he began his career in 2001; 20 years later, his music has helped him pursue his true purpose in life.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Stevie J breaks down why there should be no discussion of 90s R&B and hip hop without mentioning his name. He's most known for his iconic appearances on reality television, but Stevie J produced a long list of musical hits during his run with Bad Boy Records.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Roxanne Shante used her fierce battle rap skills, honed during street battles with local MC’s for cash, to become rap’s first female star MC with the release of her 1984 hit, “Roxanne’s Revenge.” Then at only 25 years old, she walked away from it all.

programme.title: Jean of The Joneses
programme.desc: Chaos ensues after the estranged patriarch of the Jones family dies on their doorstep. When the paramedic who answers their 911 call tried to win over acerbic Jean Jones, his attempts are disrupted by old conflicts that come to a boil at the funeral.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A vintage arcade game; Ron bargains with a bar.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A 1967 Harley motors in for a surprise overhaul; a 1940s U.S. mailbox arrives at the shop.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Bodie is tasked to restore a very rare 1970 GTO Judge in one month's time for the SEMA car show; Andy modernizes a spark plug cleaner into a stereo; Steve makes a plan to transform a beat up 64 Ford Falcon into a work of art.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and the crew work to restore a miniature Model T; a fire fighter brings in a vintage 1930s forest field service phone.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A 1962 Czechoslovakia scooter zooms into the shop; a mini 1930s oil tanker trucks into the shop.

programme.desc: Bodie fixes up a 1959 Ford F100 in hopes of flipping it to an exacting Ford truck aficionado; Andy restores a 1940's JC Higgins bike; Bob's Garage resurrects a buried 1930's gas pump.

programme.desc: It seems every time Danny finds a project for the shop, he winds up keeping it.

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby goes to Lake Ponchartrain with Belinda and Bob to obtain a huge log he marked years ago; In Florida, it's round two for the Chapman and Gump log; things go from bad to worse for the bare bones Rygaard crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The Rygaards go old school to keep the team on track; Shelby and Bob find a valuable sinker cypress; the Zitterkopf crew tries to take on a dangerous tangle of logs known as "the teepee of death."

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, the Papac team struggles to find someone to fill the shoes of injured Coatsy; Gabe Rygaard and his crew scramble to make up for their slow start; In Wyoming, David Zitterkopf and Sons keep their chainsaws humming.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In Alaska, Papac initiates an extremely dangerous process called Shotgun Logging; in Wyoming, the Zitterkopf men take the Bear Ranch site by storm; at Rygaard, the team doubles the yarders to increase production.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby uses an airboat to search for century-old logs; Rygaard attempts to move a six-ton cypress; David's sons hold down the fort while he delivers a load of logs to the mill; the Dreadknots suffer a late-day accident.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby tries to repair his custom-made buggy; David Zitterkopf makes a dangerous swing between trees; the Dreadknots go logging in the night; Triack is at a disadvantage when a crew member is injured.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Louisiana, Shelby and his assistant Bob go out looking for logs on his repaired swamp buggy; In Central Florida, the Chapman crew goes to fight against the legendary Gump log.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby goes to Lake Ponchartrain with Belinda and Bob to obtain a huge log he marked years ago; In Florida, it's round two for the Chapman and Gump log; things go from bad to worse for the bare bones Rygaard crew.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: In the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby Stanga's jet boat is in serious need of repair; in Washington, Gabe takes a risk and hires a wild card veteran logger; in Alaska, the Papac team is battling the elements mother nature is throwing their way.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga attempts to upgrade his logging empire, so he tries out some new equipment; DJ Jeremiah just may provide the spark the Rygaard has been missing; Triack's production is slowing down because of steep terrain and narrow logging roads.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Rygaard logging has started to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show; In Alaska they need to fill the seat in the yarder soon; Shelby Stanga is still without his Jetboat.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga still doesn't have his jet boat, but fortunately he has his trusty assistant Davi; the Papac crew is struggling to remain atop the King of the Mountain leaderboard, they're moving to the toughest section on their site.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby gets his jetboat back, and it now has a new engine that will help him get the job done; Rygaard is still struggling and Gabe is forced to promote his inexperienced crew, which could mean disaster.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The battle for King of The Mountain roars on; the Rygaard crew has an issue with getting the wood to the mill; Papac has to negotiate a dangerous unpredictable downhill site and mother nature isn't helping make it any easier.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The race for logs gets hot as Papac go into their most daunting site yet; at Rygaard, the crew tries to string a road over a steep draw using a device called a knife.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Only in Dog's world would a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well a group of hostile squatters on government land! They're all part of the hunt for an elusive criminal.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender with a long record ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog! And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth just bought bunnies for their kids, and Dog is enjoying helping them learn to care for their new pets. But duty calls and this is a tough case to fathom.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors but instead of hunting for treats they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving and today's hunt makes this point crystal clear. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter.

programme.desc: Only in Dog's world would a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well a group of hostile squatters on government land! They're all part of the hunt for an elusive criminal.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an offender with a long record ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call--The Dog! And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth are finally getting married! They've been together for more than ten years but Dog is determined, as he puts it, to "marry his common law wife the Christian way." There are big nuptials planned on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back hunting in the big city of Denver, but chasing fugitives on the mainland is more dangerous than ever. So Dog decides that the crew should get pepper-ball guns, which have much better range than pepper spray.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds. But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Tim's got a big problem on his hands. One of his clients, Owen, has failed to appear in court. He's on bond for serious drug charges and now Tim could lose $30,000 if he doesn't catch Owen.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the posse are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days and take care of final details but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: As Dog likes to say, "it's not the years it's the miles," and this goes for both men and machines. Those long hunts and the rides to jail take a toll not only on Dog but also on his vehicles.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs. A passerby in Chinatown tells Dog that Raymond's asleep on a park bench.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie. Heidi is a check forger who's failed to make a court appearance.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have their hands full when they go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family.

programme.desc: Richard Kuklinski claims to have murdered over 100 people for New York and New Jersey's crime families.

programme.desc: Sarah Williams and Katrina Walsh, the two friends carry out the jealousy-fuelled murder of Sadie Hartley.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners

programme.desc: Dublin man Eric Locke refuses to accept it when Sonia Blount, a mother of one, ends their relationship.

programme.desc: In 2022, Danville Neil is finally jailed for the brutal 1993 murders of a WWII veteran and his sister.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Craig Bjork, who killed two women and both of his children, remains a dangerous threat — even behind bars.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Career criminal Michael Dutcher has continued his streak of violence and murder even behind bars.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Edward Johnson was sent to prison for the brutal murder of a female friend, but the violence didn't end there.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Prisoners
programme.desc: Feared L.A. crime boss Ezequiel Romo ruthlessly runs the streets of L.A., even from behind bars.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Douglas Clark and Carol Bundy were a deadly duo who terrorized the streets of Los Angeles in the summer of 1980, targeting vulnerable women, teenagers and even a child.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Pawel Relowicz rapes and kills 21-year-old Hull student Libby Squire in a case that made headlines around the UK.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Police in Aurora, Colorado find the body of a young man in his own home with a bullet wound to the head.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of serial killer Geoffrey Evans and his accomplice John Shaw, who hit headlines in 1976.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A master manipulator accused of his wife's murder is eventually caught by a polygraph test.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A 1981 armored car robbery near New York City left one guard dead and another critically wounded. Police stopped suspects nearby and another shoot-out ensued, claiming the lives of two officers. Local police and the FBI suspected a large group of domestic terrorists with a history of violent crime. They would try to ferret out these heavily armed criminals who moved in a shadowy underworld and were not afraid to kill authorities.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway. Although he proclaimed his innocence the FBI lab experts were able to link tool marks found on the frame with tools found in Gwaltney's home. Through the match of hairs and fibers and a unique test for detecting and identifying sperm, Gwaltney was placed at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1988, a wealthy Jackson, Mississippi woman disappeared from her home in broad daylight. Left behind was a mysterious ransom note listing twelve names and no specific instructions. The note, and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate. FBI and local police struggled to find answers in the cryptic message so they could find the kidnapper and retrieve the victim before her time ran out. Solving the crime required the keen insight of a criminal profiler and the perseverance of a family, local authorities, and the FBI.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: At first it seemed like a tragic hunting accident when 18-year-old David Wilkey was shot to death in rural Virginia in 1983. A tenacious insurance investigator suspected foul play, but he had no direct evidence. Two years later a man contacted North Carolina FBI agents with a complex story of conspiracy and murder-for-hire: he claimed he had been hired to murder Wilkey's killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the early 90s, Washington, D.C. police were losing the battle against street gangs who enforced their territories with lethal violence. The homicide rate in the nation's capital climbed to the highest in the country. Local police turned to the FBI for help, but agents soon found themselves in the direct line of fire. In the fall of 1994, a gang member walked into police headquarters, killed two FBI agents and one detective, then turned the gun on himself.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Kokomo, Indiana an unthinkable crime terrified residents. A young woman was snatched from her home on a bright spring morning. Drops of blood and a torn window screen were all that was left to tell authorities what happened to the twenty-one year old victim. After several days of searching, a former FBI profiler narrowed the suspect list to one. Agents and detectives followed the trail across state lines hoping to find the victim before her time ran out.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When a Delaware woman vanished in 1996, family and friends discovered her secret life. The appointments secretary to the Governor had carried on an illicit affair with a wealthy married man. Agents suspected that her powerful ex-lover was responsible, but they had little physical evidence to support their theory. Investigators never found the woman's body or the murder weapon. The FBI's only hope was to go undercover, and turn brother against brother.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in December 1989, the only probable suspect was 24-year-old Caleb Hughes. Hughes reportedly left the party around the time Melissa vanished, but no one saw him with the girl. Fifty blue acrylic fibers collected during a search of Hughes' car, however, became the major piece of evidence in the case. FBI fiber analysis determined that those fibers were identical to the ones that made up the sweater Melissa was wearing.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the early 90s, Washington, D.C. police were losing the battle against street gangs who enforced their territories with lethal violence. The homicide rate in the nation's capital climbed to the highest in the country. Local police turned to the FBI for help, but agents soon found themselves in the direct line of fire. In the fall of 1994, a gang member walked into police headquarters, killed two FBI agents and one detective, then turned the gun on himself.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In February of 1996, New Jersey millionaire Frank Black flew to Florida to close a major business deal before retiring. He never came home. Authorities in New Jersey sensed foul play and brought in the FBI. Agents learned of a mystery woman in Florida who was to meet Black. Phone records showed a flood of calls to Black from his business rival just before the disappearance.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A day that began with a class field trip ended with a parent's worst nightmare. An 11-year-old girl was missing. Her parents were certain she was no runaway. When they failed to find her in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police. The FBI soon joined the investigation and family and friends worked with detectives and agents in an urgent search for the missing girl. Faced with conflicting witness reports and false leads, agents wouldn't stop until they found the girl, and the truth.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI (Doblado)
programme.desc: El primero de octubre de 1993, un extraño secuestró a Polly Klaas de doce años durante una piyamada en su casa. El FBI de inmediato entró en el caso. Los agentes reunieron fibras de su habitación y descubrieron, a través del uso de fuentes de luz láser, la huella de una palma en la cama de Polly, previamente invisible al ojo humano. Después de una extensa investigación de dos meses, el FBI arrestó a Richard Allen Davis. La impresión de la palma y las fibras coincidieron y Davis fue condenado por secuestro y asesinato.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A 1981 armored car robbery near New York City left one guard dead and another critically wounded. Police stopped suspects nearby and another shoot-out ensued, claiming the lives of two officers. Local police and the FBI suspected a large group of domestic terrorists with a history of violent crime. They would try to ferret out these heavily armed criminals who moved in a shadowy underworld and were not afraid to kill authorities.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When a young boy and his mother were kidnapped and murdered by a vicious drug cartel, FBI agents in the field worked tirelessly to pierce the secretive drug underworld and unearth those involved. Their surveillance and investigative work uncovered a violent trail of murder and greed. FBI agents and forensic examiners pieced together the evidence needed to draw out and then crush the cartel.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On February 3, 1990, a 14-year-old girl ran away from her mother's home and disappeared without a trace. Her mother hoped Pasadena, Texas police could find her before it was too late. Six months later, their worst fear was realized when a farmer discovered the young girl's remains in an Illinois barn. The FBI was called in to help. Agents tracked down a trucker who they believed was responsible for 50 more deaths. Investigators knew they had to stop this menace of the highways.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: He was a recluse who spread terror through the mail for 18 years. Two men died and more than a dozen were injured, but Ted Kaczynski wasn't known as the Unabomber until his brother tipped off the FBI. Kaczynski's “Unabomber Manifesto,” published in major newspapers, set off a flurry of activity for the FBI: writing analysis and comparisons, DNA gleaned from a single postage stamp and finally, Kaczynski's arrest at his tiny cabin.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On a summer afternoon in upscale Lodi, California, a 12-year-old girl is abducted from her home. Scores of police officers and FBI agents converge, determined to find the young girl before it is too late. When the kidnapper's car is discovered in a field near Lodi, police dogs, helicopters, and hundreds of volunteers are employed in a round-the-clock search. It would take a community united in concern for one of their youngest to find the missing child.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On June 21, 1964, three civil rights workers, two white and one black disappeared in Mississippi while passing through Neshoba County. A massive FBI investigation led to the recovery of the bodies of the slain men and physical evidence was recovered and analyzed. The FBI labs confirmed that all but one of the bullets used to kill the men came from the same gun. The FBI gained the trust of an informant, whose information led to the conviction of seven local Ku Klux Klan members.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1988, a wealthy Jackson, Mississippi woman disappeared from her home in broad daylight. Left behind was a mysterious ransom note listing twelve names and no specific instructions. The note, and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate. FBI and local police struggled to find answers in the cryptic message so they could find the kidnapper and retrieve the victim before her time ran out. Solving the crime required the keen insight of a criminal profiler and the perseverance of a family, local authorities, and the FBI.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1997, a series of crimes in a small Iowa farming community left residents reeling in shock and fear. Two young men went on a crime spree of robbery, kidnapping and murder, and then disappeared. By the time they were identified, they already had a twelve-hour lead. As the hunt for the two men expanded, the FBI committed its resources to tracking down the suspects. The pursuit would take agents across six states to catch the killers before they struck again.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1997, FBI agents began investigating New York gas station mogul Gurmeet Dhinsa for gas pump rigging. They soon realized that Dhinsa was more than a crooked businessman, he enforced his mob-like operation with brutal violence, kidnapping and killing errant employees and any family members who questioned their deaths. FBI agents worked their way into Dhinsa's violent world.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Two couples found themselves on the same deserted island paradise. But only one couple left alive. Buck Walker and Stephanie Stearns arrived in Hawaii on the Sea Wind, which belonged to the missing couple, Mac and Muff Graham. Buck and Stephanie were arrested and served time for boat theft. But years later, bones were discovered on the deserted island and identified as the remains of Muff Graham.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: At first it seemed like a tragic hunting accident when 18-year-old David Wilkey was shot to death in rural Virginia in 1983. A tenacious insurance investigator suspected foul play, but he had no direct evidence. Two years later a man contacted North Carolina FBI agents with a complex story of conspiracy and murder-for-hire: he claimed he had been hired to murder Wilkey's killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: From May until July of 1984, Alton Coleman and his common law wife, Denise Brown, engaged in a gruesome crime spree that spanned six states and left eight people dead including children. The FBI coordinated law enforcement efforts throughout the entire country in order to track the couple. Their expertise in conducting manhunts for the nation's most horrible killers paid off. The couple was located and apprehended as they prepared to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, a pair of convicted felons escaped the custody of a local deputy and fled across the country. Eluding authorities, they moved from state to state in a wave of abduction and car theft. When a foreign military officer disappeared along their trail, police and FBI agents wondered if the armed fugitives had become killers. Agents believed the pair were growing more violent and raced to find the escapees before more victims crossed their path.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In November of 1994, when a Wells Fargo armored van disappeared from a Glendale, Arizona mall, local authorities and the FBI scrambled to recover it, and its cargo of nearly a million dollars. Six hours later, agents found the van, its driver shot dead inside and the money gone. It was a perfect hit by professionals who left no clue behind. Months passed before a solid lead developed. In January, a tip led agents to look into a former prison guard.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Anchorage, Alaska, a young mother and her two daughters were sexually assaulted and brutally murdered. There was only one piece of forensic evidence: a washrag carrying pubic lice that the killer used to clean himself after the crime. Employing an unusual and original method, an FBI expert combed through all the hairs and fibers in the apartment. He was not only able to determine how long each hair had been there, but which hairs came from the killer and how the crime proceeded.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: By December 1985, John Gotti had assumed his place as the new Don of the Gambino crime family in New York with the assassination of his boss, Paul Castellano. The Teflon Don felt secure in his position, always remaining one step ahead of the law. But he was also the ongoing obsession of Bruce Mouw, leader of an elite crew of FBI agents formed to bring down the Gambino family. With the help and genius of his Special Projects Squad, bugs were planted in Gotti's most private meeting places.

programme.desc: Detectives and forensic experts recount the most extraordinary cold cases that were solved using the revolutionary technique of familial DNA testing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the 'Last Call Killer' because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.¾

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence but was sentenced to 25 years in prison. He turned to the law books in the prison library and TV about forensic science and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000,¾Kristine Fitzhugh¾failed to show up for her music class and her husband Ken found her dead at the bottom of the stairs of their Palo Alto home. Upon further investigation, luminol reveals evidence of murder in the kitchen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home and then the killer sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend Janet Haynes.¾

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman went missing, friends and family were determined to find her. Their worst fears were confirmed weeks later when her body was discovered.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Hector Bridges, a local magistrate, is infuriated when one of his geese is stolen, just as two bands of travellers arrive in Martyr Warren. Although Barnaby and Troy are called in to deal with the theft and later dissuade him from forcefully evicting the travellers from the village, they soon have a murder on their hands, when a short while later Bridges is killed with his own shotgun. It quickly transpires that many in the village had hated the magistrate, who lied, bullied, and committed many an injustice, leaving the detectives determined to find who among them had pulled the trigger after Bridges pushed them past their breaking point.

programme.title: Las Camelias
programme.desc: La seductora Margarita Gautier es cortejada por varios hombres, pero ella entrega su corazón a sólo uno: Armando, un chico de sociedad comprometido, quien le corresponde y lo arriesga todo para estar con ella.

programme.title: Por Tu Culpa
programme.desc: Sara conoce a dos hombres en la playa y se enamora de ambos. La situación se complica cuando descubre que son hermanos y debe elegir entre ellos.

programme.title: Café Con Sabor a Mi Tierra
programme.desc: La historia de una familia cafetalera cuya cosecha se ve amenazada por una terrible plaga y los bajos precios.

programme.desc: Raymundo es un humilde trabajador que siempre ayuda a los demás, pero un día todo cambia y tiene que arriesgar su vida contra unos terratenientes.

programme.desc: Un pueblo que ha sido devastado por el cólera, se ve atacado por un ejército comandado por un hombre vengativo.

programme.desc: Un hombre jura vengar la muerte de su primo y para ello deberá liberar a un famoso reo que conoce al asesino.

programme.desc: Tras ser demandados por mal mantenimiento, los domirriqueños montan un circo chino para pagar deudas, desatando situaciones hilarantes.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: Apuesta Final
programme.desc: Dae-gil, un príncipe obligado a vivir como un plebeyo, arriesga su vida cuando usa sus habilidades de juego para participar en una partida contra el rey Yeongjo, quien apuesta todo el Reino de Joseon.

programme.title: Sol naciente
programme.desc: Mario y Alicia son amigos de la infancia, él es nieto de migrantes italianos y ella es adoptada por Tanaka, un japonés. Cuando Alicia decide estudiar dos años en Japón, Mario se da cuenta de que lo que siente por ella es más que una amistad. Luego del reencuentro él tiene que lidiar con otro obstáculo, César, que trata de enamorar a la joven, pero con oscuras intenciones. Entonces, los Di Angelo y los Tanaka ponen a prueba sus sentimientos a pesar de las traiciones, las estafas y las mentiras.

programme.title: Orgullo y pasión
programme.desc: Elisabeta es una joven rebelde y llena de sueños que lucha contra el único destino para una mujer de buena familia en su época: casarse. Su osadía y su independencia la meterán en más de un problema.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.desc: Mario y Alicia son amigos de la infancia, él es nieto de migrantes italianos y ella es adoptada por Tanaka, un japonés. Cuando Alicia decide estudiar dos años en Japón, Mario se da cuenta de que lo que siente por ella es más que una amistad. Luego del reencuentro él tiene que lidiar con otro obstáculo, César, que trata de enamorar a la joven, pero con oscuras intenciones. Entonces, los Di Angelo y los Tanaka ponen a prueba sus sentimientos a pesar de las traiciones, las estafas y las mentiras.

programme.title: Orgullo y pasión
programme.desc: Elisabeta es una joven rebelde y llena de sueños que lucha contra el único destino para una mujer de buena familia en su época: casarse. Su osadía y su independencia la meterán en más de un problema.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: Heartwarming and inspiring stories of the unbreakable bonds between human and animal.

programme.title: WXII Local News
programme.desc: Get the latest news and weather from WXII.

programme.title: Unbelievable
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: A look at daring escapes from custody and the breakouts that take on many forms – yet always involve finding and exploiting the weakest parts of the system.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.desc: Meet Gary and Karen, he’s a little adventurous, and she’s a little stay-at-home, but it will all change after 12 years of marriage. Kinga, Gary, and Karen embark on a crash course in adventure through the Granite State.

programme.title: LIVE: WXII 12 News
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the WXII 12 News team.

programme.title: LIVE: WXII 12 News
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from WXII 12 News.

programme.title: Juvenile Lifers: Road to Redemption
programme.desc: (2019) Juvenile Lifers: Road to Redemption focuses on people who were sentenced to life in prison as juveniles. WGAL News 8's Matt Barcaro examines how these these former offenders are re-entering society and the reaction from victims' families.

programme.title: Pulse: Orlando Still Strong
programme.desc: Two journalists describe the lasting impact of the Pulse nightclub shooting.

programme.title: Only In
programme.desc: Where can you find a unique Georgian toasting feast, a hidden craft beer bike lounge, and a massive mural of hope? The same place with unique woven works of art and a beloved baseball legend.

programme.title: Plate It!
programme.desc: Food truck father Jimmy Longoria is up against munchy meal mother Helen Markatos. Can these chefs elevate the kids menu? Or will their dishes send them to time out?

programme.title: Free Spirit
programme.desc: Kate regains her faith in the classic Hurricane, talks history and equity in the cocktail industry, pledges allegiance to the French 75, and dives into a rich New Orleans cocktail culture that’s much bigger than Bourbon Street.

programme.title: What's On The Menu?
programme.desc: Get a serious sugar rush as four of Pittsburgh’s purveyors of delicious desserts share their stories and their sweets.

programme.title: FIXT
programme.desc: Ted wants to live to 100 with his beloved wife beside him. But his oral health threatens his future. Kristy’s a FIXT staffer desperate to smile big on her wedding day. Will love help them face their fears?

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: A fugitive escapes through the ceiling. A man plows his car into the police station. These shocking stories prove cops don't even have to leave the building to encounter the unpredictable.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: Sports create pockets of communities all across our country. For people of all ages who love the game, it's more than just exercise: it can give hope, support, inspiration and a future.

programme.title: WXII 12 News
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from the WXII 12 News Team.

programme.title: Searching for Johnny
programme.desc: (2022) The disappearance of Johnny Gosch is one of Iowa's longest running, and most notorious mysteries. In 1982, the 12-year-old paperboy in West Des Moines vanished without a trace. Forty years later, KCCI uncovers where the investigation stands.

programme.title: The Journey: 70 Years of WXII
programme.desc: Celebrating 70 years of WXII 12’s service to the community.

programme.title: On The Job
programme.desc: Brendan dodges the fangs of venomous snakes, suits up to wrangle bees and sell local honey, and dives headfirst into protecting the future of Florida's coral reefs.

programme.title: Heroes On Call
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Good Deed DIY
programme.desc: Teachers deserve the best! Monica races against the clock to transform a beloved educator’s staff lounge. Can she pull off this scholastic surprise?

programme.title: One Pill Can Kill
programme.desc: Told through the voices of grieving parents, this documentary follows the real and lasting impact of the fentanyl crisis. Capturing the aftermath of sudden loss, the search for answers, and the transformation of grief into public advocacy.

programme.title: Bourbon Blaze: The Night That Tested America's Spirit
programme.desc: When a massive fire hits one of the nation’s largest bourbon distilleries, the families of competing bourbon companies have to decide whether to lend a hand… or let it burn. This is the story of bourbon, America’s native spirit.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.desc: Chefs recreate each other’s signature dish, but they can only determine what the dish is using their senses of taste, touch and smell. When the masks come off, the heat is on, with each chef attempting to cook their opponent’s creation.

programme.title: WXII 12 News
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from the WXII 12 News Team.

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.desc: Embark on amazing adventures across America with host Kinga Philipps who takes locals out of their comfort zones to experience transformation in the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Journey: 70 Years of WXII
programme.desc: Celebrating 70 years of WXII 12’s service to the community.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: A teenager survives the unspeakable in her Elk Grove, California, home. When her younger sister goes missing, investigators question her about what she witnessed and uncover a tragedy that will shape her path from trauma to truth.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: Detectives are baffled after a mother and daughter in an affluent family are murdered outside Louisville. A year later, a triple homicide in North Carolina sends detectives on an explosive search, linking the two cases through an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Good Deed DIY
programme.desc: Monica joins non-profit volunteers to DIY an essential community space... with a little help from an army of volunteers.

programme.title: WXII 12 News
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from the WXII 12 News Team.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.desc: As flames from the deadly 2017 Tubbs Fire tore through Santa Rosa, a first-time mother went into labor, while families fled with moments to spare… before making the powerful choice to return.
